lineup_source: Bosnia and Herzegovina vs Qatar, Group B, June 2026 (4-3-2-1)

players.name: Nikola Vasilj
players.note: Born in Mostar; father Vladimir, a former Croatia international goalkeeper, was born in Hanover, West Germany.

players.name: Amar Dedic
players.note: Born in Zell am See, Austria, to Bosnian parents.

players.name: Nikola Katic
players.note: Born in Ljubuski; ethnic Croat from Bosnia, formerly a Croatia youth international before switching to Bosnia in 2024.

players.name: Dennis Hadzikadunic
players.note: Born in Malmo, Sweden, to Bosnian parents who emigrated; played Swedish youth football before switching to Bosnia.

players.name: Sead Kolasinac
players.note: Born in Karlsruhe, Germany, to Bosniak parents (father Faik) who fled the Bosnian War.

players.name: Kerim Alajbegovic
players.note: Born in Cologne, Germany, to Bosnian parents.

players.name: Ivan Sunjic
players.note: Born in Bosnia and Herzegovina; no documented foreign parental origin found.

players.name: Benjamin Tahirovic
players.note: Born in Spanga, a Stockholm suburb, to parents of Bosnian origin; chose Bosnia over Sweden internationally.

players.name: Amar Memic
players.note: Born in Sarajevo; no documented foreign parental origin found.

players.name: Edin Dzeko
players.note: Born in Sarajevo to Midhat and Belma Dzeko, both Bosnian; father also a former footballer.

players.name: Ermedin Demirovic
players.note: Born in Hamburg, Germany, to Bosnian immigrant parents.
